productDisplayName: Proline Men's Printed Chalk Cream Brown T-shirt
description: CompositionCream round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed neckline, short sleeves, distressed look graphic on the front, black stitch detailing on the side seams, brand badge on the front left hem and distressed look brand seal badge on the back of the neckFittingComfortWash care Dry clean preferred Wash inside out separately using a mild detergent only Do not bleach Drip dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on design/decoration Look cool when you go out with friends in this cream t-shirt from proline's Vintage Collection. The distressed look graphic on the front pays tribute to vintage Sports and to a bygone era. The brand badge on the hem and the brand sela on the centre back represents the brand's commitment to sports and reinforces the vintage look.
